title: geranium ponticum
intro: Geranium ponticum, also known as the Russian geranium, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Caucasus region and parts of Europe. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. Geranium ponticum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and creams, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
